zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey la Zouche於大約1105年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰時，他的父親Eudon ou Eudes I Vicomte de Porhoet et Rohan58歲，母親Emma de Leon50歲。他於大約1120年與Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany在法國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1141年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年38歲，埋葬在英國戴文諾斯 莫爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey la Zouche was born about 1105, in Rohan, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Eudon ou Eudes I Vicomte de Porhoet et Rohan, was 58 and his mother, Emma de Leon, was 50. He married Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany about 1120, in France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1141, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in North Molton, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey la Zouche est né environ 1105, à Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Eudon ou Eudes I Vicomte de Porhoet et Rohan, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Emma de Leon, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany environ 1120, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1141, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à North Molton, Devon, Angleterre.

de.And Ashby, Zouch, Leicester, England: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey la Zouche um 1105 in Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudon ou Eudes I Vicomte de Porhoet et Rohan 58 und seine Mutter Emma de Leon 50. Er hat um 1120 in Frankreich Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1141 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in North Molton, Devon, England begraben.

Lui sposato Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany circa 1120, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1141, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a North Molton, Devon, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey la Zouche(이)가 대략 1105년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 로핸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudon ou Eudes I Vicomte de Porhoet et Rohan(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Leon(은)는 50세였다. 그는 대략 1120년 프랑스에서 Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1141년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 노르스 모턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey la Zouche nasceu aproximadamente 1105, em Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Eudon ou Eudes I Vicomte de Porhoet et Rohan, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Leon, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany aproximadamente 1120, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1141, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.And Ashby, Zouch, Leicester, England: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey la Zouche родился около 1105 г. в местности рохань, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudon ou Eudes I Vicomte de Porhoet et Rohan было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Leon, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany около 1120 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1141 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности норт молтон, девон, Англия.

Se casó con Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany aproximadamente 1120, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1141, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra.
